front: What is mass spectrometry (MS) and how is it used for peptide analysis?
back: MS ionizes peptides and measures mass-to-charge (m/z) ratio. MALDI-TOF: intact mass measurement. ESI: coupling to LC for sequencing. MS/MS (tandem): fragmentation for de novo sequencing. Key for identifying peptide modifications, disulfide bonds, and post-translational modifications.
